Trails.Name: Lower Wanderer, West Meadows, Mike's Way
Old Log Rd, West Meadows, Mike's Way
Sun Bowl, Home Run, 91, Main Base Area

_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
3/5 2:30PM - Howdy, Stratton! Yet another fun day in the books. Let’s do it all again tomorrow by taking turns down 98 open trails. Snowcats have been working away on Beardown to flatten the whales in hopes of opening by the weekend. Overnight, our grooming crew will work their magic on 62 trails. Alongside, 11 lifts are set to spin at 9AM, with weather rolling in overnight, you may see some delays. Speaking of weather, we're tracking 1–5" of new snow overnight. Keep those snow dances going, because winter still has plenty left to give.

Catch y’all in the morning! 

Safety Tip: Be aware of changing weather and snow conditions. 

The 2026 FIS Freestyle Ski NorAm Cup is going down this Saturday and Sunday on World Cup! Spectators are welcome to hike up Old Log Road (free of charge) or ski down to the Snow Bowl lift. If hiking, snowshoes are recommended and can be rented at First Run Ski Shop in the Village. Not able to make it? Watch the event live via the Snow Bowl Webcam. Welcome and good luck to all of the competitors!
